description_long: This bungalow features a single-story, elongated rectangular structure with a low-pitched, red hip roof and white exterior walls. The building includes multiple evenly spaced rectangular windows along its sides, and a small porch area is visible at one end, partially sheltered by an extended roof. The property is enclosed by a low white perimeter wall, and a small tree is present near the entrance, adding a touch of greenery. The roof is composed of several intersecting hip sections, giving the structure a distinctive, multi-faceted appearance. The main entrance is located at the shorter end of the building, adjacent to the porch. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban or urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a red hip roof, multiple rectangular windows, and a small porch at one end, surrounded by a low perimeter wall.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the bungalow with several evenly spaced windows and the porch area with a small tree near the entrance.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the hip roof's geometry and the main entrance at the short end, with the perimeter wall enclosing the property.
description_view_2: The rear side of the bungalow is visible, showing more windows and the continuation of the perimeter wall, with a small tree at the far end.
description_view_3: This view looks down the length of the property, emphasizing the open yard area, the porch, and the arrangement of the roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with evenly spaced side windows
